message:
✨ collapsible sidebar tree, session persistence, EPG ID prefix fix, URL copy button

- Replace horizontal pill filter with collapsible sidebar tree navigation
  (Favorites, Groups sections with expand/collapse, icons-only collapsed mode)
- Fix EPG ID mismatch: prefix mapped IDs with sourceId for programme lookup
- Add session persistence: save/restore last channel and group via SharedPreferences
- Auto-fade title bar after 3s, reappears on hover or fullscreen exit
- Add copy button next to stream URL in debug dialog
- Remove unused _FilterChip class

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
